title: psychotria conica subsp. ngovayangensis
intro: Psychotria conica subsp. ngovayangensis is a rare and endangered subspecies of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to Vietnam. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria conica subsp. ngovayangensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea or infused in water, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs for various health benefits.
